posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml:
Group Kanban app allows you to create kanban based on item groups.

Key Features:

  • Group Kanban: Use your item groups as kanban columns
  • Drag-and-Drop Updates: Effortlessly manage your tasks by dragging and dropping items within the Kanban board.
  • Customizable Item Cards: Select which columns of items will be visible in the Kanban item card for a personalized view.
  • Column Value Updates: Update other column values of items directly from the Kanban view, ensuring your data is always current.

Benefits:

  • Enhanced Productivity: Streamline your workflow and increase team productivity with a visual task management system.
  • Improved Organization: Keep all your tasks in one place, with easy access to important details.
  • Custom Views: Tailor the Kanban board to display the information most relevant to your team’s needs.
  • Real-Time Collaboration: Teams can see updates and changes instantly, facilitating better collaboration and communication.

Use Cases:

  • Project Management: Track project progress, assign tasks, and manage deadlines with ease.
  • Product Development: Visualize stages of product development and ensure all tasks are on track.
  • Marketing Campaigns: Organize campaign tasks, monitor performance, and adjust plans in real-time.
  • HR Recruitment: Manage candidate pipelines, track interview stages, and coordinate recruitment efforts seamlessly.

Solve Problems:

  • Task Overload: By visualizing tasks, teams can avoid overload and ensure balanced workloads.
  • Lack of Visibility: Keep everyone on the same page with a clear, shared view of project statuses and priorities.
  • Data Discrepancy: Ensure data accuracy by updating item details directly within the Kanban board.
